user.title: Set up Wattson
user.description: Wattson steers your home battery based on dynamic energy prices using a rolling-horizon planner. Only one instance is needed — configure the source entities afterwards via the Options button.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Wattson is already configured. Only one instance is allowed.

init.title: Wattson — source entities
init.description: Point Wattson at the entities on your own installation.

data.ent_price: Price sensor (dynamic tariff, with forecast attribute)
data.ent_bat_chg: Battery charge power sensor (optional, enables watchdog)
data.ent_bat_dis: Battery discharge power sensor (optional, enables watchdog)
data.ent_gen_power: Generic: signed power number (+W charge / -W discharge)
data.ent_ms_mode: Marstek: force mode entity (select or number, 0=stop/1=charge/2=discharge)
data.verkoop_drempel_eur: Sell threshold (€/kWh net sell price, sell switch must be on)

error.invalid_number: One of the numeric values is not a valid number.
error.soc_out_of_range: Minimum SoC must be between 0 and 100%.
error.generic_power_missing: Generic adapter needs a signed power number, or both a charge and a discharge number.
